Control Question: Is all customer and regulatory data encrypted both in transit (TLS 1.3) and at rest (AES-256)?
Validation Evidence Required: Provide current cryptographic configuration policies and KMS architecture maps.

Control Question: Does your platform support centralized identity integration via SAML/SSO and enforce mandatory Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)?
Validation Evidence Required: Provide screenshots of IAM configuration console or identity provider metadata files.

Control Question: Do you provide a continuously updated Software Bill of Materials (SBOM) for all application dependencies to track vulnerabilities?
Validation Evidence Required: Provide a sample cycloneDX or SPDX formatted SBOM from your latest production build.

Control Question: Does your organization test your disaster recovery playbooks using tabletop simulations or active failover drills at least annually?
Validation Evidence Required: Provide the executive summary of the most recent third-party BCDR audit or tabletop sign-off sheet.
